noise_semantics.crn: one shared additive draw in each plus/center/minus triplet; the centered second difference cancels it
noise_semantics.independent: independent additive noise in plus, minus, and center evaluations

scope.core_helper_verification: arithmetic equivalence for identical numeric pair responses only
scope.coverage: finite-sample empirical calibration; not a guarantee
scope.moment_standard_error: naive pair-contribution SE; LOO contributions are dependent
